label: Instagram — Social Feed Browser
description: Extracted from: ScrapeClaw instagram-scraper, drawrowfly/instagram-scraper, instascrape, scrapfly.io Instagram guides. Verified 2026-07-16: 939px landing page. Login gate — no feed content without auth. Requires main mode with active session.
source_patterns: Infinite scroll feed: 200-400px per pass, 2-4s between (image consumption)
Modal open after click: wait 1-2s for post overlay to render
Like: hover on target (1s) → click. Double-tap also common on mobile UA
Comment: click icon → 800ms → type slowly → 2-4s → post
Login: type username (pause 300-800ms per field), click login, wait 3-5s

active_hours.description: Peak social media hours — lunch, evening

scroll.description: Feed-style: short bursts, looking at content between. Source: instascrape

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate → scroll feed (4-6 passes) → click post → wait modal → scroll post → interact
